title: Goodluck 3 Pack Clear Plastic Serving Bowls for Party - 570ml/20oz Angled Reusable Salad Bowls for Wedding, Party, Crisps, Candy, Snacks, Salad & Fruit
features: Tilted Design: The transparent plastic bowl features a slanted opening, showcasing food clearly for easy serving. Its wide, sturdy rim prevents spills, making it ideal for both everyday use and festive gatherings.

Versatile Serving Bowl: With a generous 570ml/20 oz capacity, plastic bowls holds sweets, crisps, snacks, fruit, or salad. Suitable for both hot and cold foods without warping, it makes every occasion stylish, effortless, and stress-free.

Safe & Durable: Made from food-grade BPA-free materials, this plastic bowl offers a safer alternative to fragile glass, ensuring peace of mind during parties. It’s reusable and easy to clean with water. Please note: not recommended for use in microwaves or dishwashers.

Lightweight & Portable: The salad bowl is lightweight, making it easy to carry and transport. Perfect for reducing load on outings—great for camping, picnics, barbecues, garden weddings, and other outdoor occasions.
Perfect for Any Occasion & Tableware: Our elegant party bowl is ideal for weddings, Halloween, Thanksgiving, Christmas, birthdays, dinners, holidays, baby showers, or casual get-togethers.
